headline: Billionaire Stanley Druckenmiller: Selling This AI Stock Was a 'Big Mistake'
summary: Hedge fund manager Stanley Druckenmiller regrets the decision to sell his fund's stake in Nvidia.

headline: Elon Musk Sparks Controversy With Hard-Right 'Make Europe Great Again!' Post
summary: Elon Musk has stirred the pot with a recent post on X shifting "from MAGA to MEGA" to "Make Europe Great Again!"

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Tesla, Apple, Meta And Dogecoin Influencers See Pattern For Post-2025 Inauguration Rally
summary:
Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week — here’s a look at some of our top stories.



The Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq gained 3.7%, 2.9%, and 2.5% this week, respectively, with all three posting their strongest advances in weeks.

headline: TikTok Says It Will Be 'Forced To Go Dark' In US On Jan 19 After Supreme Court Upholds Ban
summary: TikTok has announced that it will cease operations in the U.S. on Sunday, unless the Biden administration provides assurances to tech giants.

headline: Mark Zuckerberg Lauds Sheryl Sandberg Amid Blame For Meta's DEI Program: 'She Did Amazing Work'
summary: Mark Zuckerberg has publicly praised former Meta Platforms Inc's (NASDAQ: META) COO Sheryl Sandberg despite reports suggesting he held her responsible for the company's diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) program.

headline: Tim Cook Reveals Apple Watch Saved His Father's Life By Alerting Emergency Services, But His Father 'More Upset' Because Of This
summary: Earlier this week, Apple CEO Tim Cook shared a personal story about how the Apple Watch saved his father's life.

headline: US Regulator Probes Elon Musk's SpaceX Mid-Flight Explosion That Felt Like An 'Earthquake' For Turks And Caicos Residents
summary: The US FAA and authorities from the Turks and Caicos Islands have initiated investigations into the explosion of SpaceX's Starship rocket.

headline: Mark Zuckerberg Stands To Gain The Most From TikTok's US Ban: Meta Could Reap Billions In Ad Revenue
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. reportedly stands to gain significantly if TikTok, a popular social media platform, is banned from US app stores this Sunday.
